techniques.evidence_quote: based on the use of long-term access keys (AKIA) and the automated activity, we surmise that the attacker was likely using leaked access keys
attempting the API calls ListSecrets and ListVaults
attempts to enumerate AWS S3 buckets with the ListBuckets API call and then determine their contents by using the ListObjects API call
the attacker attempted to run each of these API calls across 17 regions in under a minute
The attacker was using a mix of residential proxies and a VPN client, specifically the Cloudflare Warp VPN
the target of the campaign may have been Amazon Bedrock and the possible misuse of LLM resources

attack_chain.description: Attacker used likely leaked long-term AWS IAM access keys (AKIA) to authenticate to victim AWS environments.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: based on the use of long-term access keys (AKIA) and the automated activity, we surmise that the attacker was likely using leaked access keys

evidence_chunks.quote: based on the use of long-term access keys (AKIA) and the automated activity, we surmise that the attacker was likely using leaked access keys
based on the use of long-term access keys (AKIA) and the automated activity, we surmise that the attacker was likely using leaked access keys

attack_chain.description: Attacker routed API calls through residential proxies and Cloudflare WARP VPN to mask origin.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: The attacker was using a mix of residential proxies and a VPN client, specifically the Cloudflare Warp VPN

attack_chain.description: Attacker issued ListSecrets (Secrets Manager) and ListVaults (S3 Glacier) API calls across 17 regions within a minute to enumerate available secrets and Glacier vaults.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: attempting the API calls ListSecrets and ListVaults ... across 17 regions in under a minute

attack_chain.description: Attacker enumerated S3 buckets using ListBuckets and then contents using ListObjects across available buckets.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: attempts to enumerate AWS S3 buckets with the ListBuckets API call and then determine their contents by using the ListObjects API call

attack_chain.description: According to parallel Lacework reporting on the same campaign, attackers targeted Amazon Bedrock for LLMjacking / misuse of LLM resources.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: the target of the campaign may have been Amazon Bedrock and the possible misuse of LLM resources

evidence_chunks.quote: the target of the campaign may have been Amazon Bedrock and the possible misuse of LLM resources
the target of the campaign may have been Amazon Bedrock and the possible misuse of LLM resources

persistence_mechanism: None observed; attacker continued to use the compromised long-term access keys.
